title: chrysopogon copei
intro: Chrysopogon copei, also known as Vettiver oil grass, is a type of perennial grass native to India and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its essential oil, which has anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The medicinal properties of Chrysopogon copei are said to promote relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality, while also providing relief from muscle and joint pain. Chrysopogon copei is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, massage oils, and topical creams, and can also be consumed as a tea or capsule.
